metric_rule: Cobb-Douglas is secondary construct sensitivity and cannot make a transition-dead action live.

catalog_scope_correction.reason: Routing every row in the frozen decision_right_catalog_v1 proves coverage of that declaration, not exhaustion of thesis-grounded state distinctions. This correction identifies two gaps but does not prove that no further gap exists.

semantic_errors.reason: Thesis Op7 performs quality control; Op6 is the rework destination. The frozen v1 catalog is preserved rather than silently rewritten.
DRA2 controls the Op7-Op8 finished-ration convoy and does not audit component-specific raw-material load composition.

thesis_native_facts.detection_coverage: not specified by thesis; the current DES treats every generated R14 defect as detected

inspection_effort.exact_zero_reason: No sequential inspection action or effort-response curve enters the transition kernel.
inspection_effort.optimistic_two_level_reversal_condition: Simplified screen only: assume normalized base throughput, no false positives, immediate unit-yield recovery and qualified output (1-delta)*(1-p+p*s). Then delta must satisfy T(.03) <= delta < T(.08), where T(p)=p*(s_H-s_L)/(1-p+p*s_H). At s_L=0 and s_H=1 this is 0.03 <= delta < 0.08. This is not a general inspection theorem.
required_conservation: exogenous per-unit or per-lot latent-quality draws are coupled under CRN; realized counts may vary only through a declared production-exposure coupling when policies produce different quantities
latent defective units = inspected true-positive units + inspected false-negative units + uninspected defective units
latent conforming units = inspected true-negative units + inspected false-positive units + uninspected conforming units
escaped defective units = inspected false-negative units + uninspected defective units
classified-nonconforming units = inspected true-positive units + inspected false-positive units = reworked units + scrapped units + held/queued units
only qualified or successfully reworked units satisfy demand
R14 metric activation is independent of the inspection action

existing_r14_configuration_boundary.reason: The constructor alternatives thesis_strict_op6, reprocess and discard change queues, raw-material return and scrap. They are alternative episode physics, not within-episode lot-disposition rights.

omitted_families.separation_from_product_mix: Freeze one finished-ration type and remove output-product choice/substitution; the only action allocates complementary inputs or expedition lift.
omitted_families.exact_zero_reason: The DES aggregates rm1...rm12, applies R13 as a common Op2 delay and has no finite component-load Op4 action.
omitted_families.necessary_liveness: For K(x,p)=min_i floor((x_i+p_i)/b_i), two equal-resource loads a,b must produce K(x,p+y_a) != K(x,p+y_b), and the limiting component must change across material observable states.
h_pi_and_h_obs_zero_regimes: R13 is a common scalar delay
omitted_families.observable_only_null: If component identity exists but is not known before dispatch, H_obs=0 while H_PI may remain positive.

omitted_families.separation_from_inspection: Freeze the inspection/detection rule and reveal defect quantity before action; disposition cannot change sampling, sensitivity or specificity.
omitted_families.exact_zero_reason: The thesis fixes return to Op6 and r14_defect_mode is an episode configuration, not a sequential action.
omitted_families.necessary_reversal: Reduced shadow-cost screen only: D_reduced(s)=lambda_C(s)*(h_r/y_r-h_n)-lambda_R(s)*b, where lambda_C is canonical marginal value per line-hour, lambda_R is canonical marginal value per replacement-material unit, h_r is rework line-hours, y_r is rework yield, h_n is replacement-production hours and b is replacement material units. A sign change is necessary only within this reduced model. It omits lead, hold, disposal, repeat-defect and deadline effects; a licensed contract needs D_total(s). Under current same-rate unit-yield physics, rework weakly dominates discard on qualified service/material use.
omitted_families.metric_guard: The original R14 event must remain attributed through replacement so disposition cannot launder the Excel risk indicator.
